nasb.text: Your rulers are rebels And companions of thieves; Everyone loves a bribe And chases after rewards. They do not defend the orphan, Nor does the widow’s plea come before them.

esv.text: Your princes are rebels and companions of thieves. Everyone loves a bribe and runs after gifts. They do not bring justice to the fatherless, and the widow’s cause does not come to them.

cnv.text: 你的官長存心悖逆， 與盜賊同夥； 人都貪愛賄賂， 追索私酬； 他們不替孤兒伸冤， 寡婦的案件也呈不到他們面前。

ccb.text: 你的首领是叛逆之徒， 与盗贼为伍， 个个收受贿赂， 贪图好处， 不为孤儿辩护， 不替寡妇申冤。

csbs.text: 你的首领们悖逆，与盗贼同伙； 他们都贪爱贿赂，追逐赃酬； 他们不为孤儿伸冤； 寡妇的争讼也达不到他们面前。
